description_long: This compact rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly gray and black color scheme and subtle red accents on functional components such as the trigger, safety, and charging handle. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal, with the handguard displaying a series of circular ventilation holes for heat dissipation. The grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling, and the magazine is a detachable box type, extending vertically from the lower receiver. The top of the rifle includes a short Picatinny rail for mounting optics, and the iron sights are integrated into the rail system. The barrel is short and robust, with a simple muzzle and no visible muzzle device, making this weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a gray and black finish, red accent controls, ventilated handguard, and detachable box magazine. Features an ergonomic grip, short barrel, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, ventilated handguard, and the alignment of the magazine below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the textured grip, magazine, and visible red controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, grip, and the magazine's rear profile.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and the handguard's ventilation holes.
